title: Disticholiparis pandurata
taxonomy: Disticholiparis pandurata is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Disticholiparis is a part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. More specifically, it is placed within the tribe Coelogyneae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchids.
